description: Written by /init to ~/.claude/roambee-config.json. All fields are optional until the feature that needs them is first used.

accountId.description: AWS account ID owning the CodeArtifact domain

profile.description: AWS CLI profile name, e.g. default

keyEnvVar.description: Name of the env var holding the API key, e.g. OPENROUTER_API_KEY

memory.description: Team memory config used by /remember and /recall. Currently backed by claude-mem (auto-capture). Fill in when graphify/hindsight is ready.

backend.description: Storage backend. 'claude-mem' = auto-captured sessions via claude-mem plugin (default). 'graphify' = POST/GET to graphify/hindsight API.

endpoint.description: Base URL of the graphify/hindsight API. Only required when backend=graphify.

wiki.description: Decklar Wiki config used by hook-17, hook-18, and /wiki. Populated by /init Step 8.

endpoint.description: Memory Service base URL. e.g. https://memory-staging.decklar.com

agentName.description: User identity in the wiki world. A clean human name blob, e.g. heet or heet-shah.

apiKeyEnvVar.description: Name of the env var holding the API key, e.g. WIKI_API_KEY

accountIdEnvVar.description: Name of the env var holding the account ID, e.g. WIKI_ACCOUNT_ID
